title: Resources, services and information to help employers :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Resources, services and information to help employers
Find links to helpful tools and services for employers.
- VisaView for employers VisaView is an online service that allows employers to check the immigration status of a person, and whether they can work in New Zealand.

## VisaView for employers
VisaView is an online service that allows employers to check the immigration status of a person, and whether they can work in New Zealand.
- Connecting you with skilled workers overseas using Skillfinder SkillFinder is a free online tool that connects New Zealand employers with skilled workers overseas who have expressed an interest in living and working in New Zealand.

## Connecting you with skilled workers overseas using Skillfinder
SkillFinder is a free online tool that connects New Zealand employers with skilled workers overseas who have expressed an interest in living and working in New Zealand.
- Check if someone can legally work for you Before someone from overseas can begin working for you, you must check that their visa gives them the right to work in New Zealand. Find out how.

## Check if someone can legally work for you
Before someone from overseas can begin working for you, you must check that their visa gives them the right to work in New Zealand. Find out how.
- Applying for someone else Immigration advisers, employers, and education agents and providers, and travel agents can use the Immigration Online system to help others apply for visas.

## Applying for someone else
Immigration advisers, employers, and education agents and providers, and travel agents can use the Immigration Online system to help others apply for visas.
- The Visa Verification Service You can check the details of a New Zealand visa using our online Visa Verification Service.

## The Visa Verification Service
You can check the details of a New Zealand visa using our online Visa Verification Service.
- Let us know if an employee has left your employment If a worker from overseas has a visa that specifies employment with your business and leaves that employment, you can inform us about it.

## Let us know if an employee has left your employment
If a worker from overseas has a visa that specifies employment with your business and leaves that employment, you can inform us about it.
- Updates for employers Sign up for regular email updates about changes to immigration rules and policies.

## Updates for employers
Sign up for regular email updates about changes to immigration rules and policies.
